package rulecoverage

func NegativeRequestLoggingFieldsAssembledDifferentlyAcrossHandlers() string {
    ruleID := "request_logging_fields_assembled_differently_across_handlers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Inconsistent request-log field sets across the same API module."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
